import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut count = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = string.byte_at(input, i).ok_or(0)
    mut byte = 0
    match b
    when Ok(v)
      byte = v
    when Err(_)
      byte = 0
    end
    if byte >= 48 and byte <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (byte - 48)
      in_num = true
    else
      if in_num
        if count < 2
          nums = replace_at(nums, count, cur)
          count = count + 1
        end
        cur = 0
        in_num = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num and count < 2
    nums = replace_at(nums, count, cur)
    count = count + 1
  end
  let a = nums[0]
  let b = nums[1]
  let g = gcd(a, b)
  println("gcd=#{g}")
end

fn replace_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result = [0, 0]
  if idx == 0
    result = [v, xs[1]]
  else
    result = [xs[0], v]
  end
  result
end

fn gcd(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  mut x = a
  mut y = b
  while y != 0
    let t = x % y
    x = y
    y = t
  end
  x
end
